note: lap 1 - Silas Krag-Vrolijk looses several positions:

intro: A race is on the itinerary today,Wheeling of the iFormula League,Gathered here at Red Bull Ring,To master the Grand Prix with speed. The clock starts ticking 'round three o'clock,The drivers ready for the shock,When off they'll go, each burning fastest lap,In a dash for glory - no time for a nap!
